title: Restaurant Recommendation Email
scenario: Generate an email recommending a local restaurant to a customer. The email should be in plain text format and must include at least 2 reasons why the customer should dine at the restaurant, 1 special promotion, and a call-to-action.
constraints: Must include at least 2 reasons why the customer should dine at the restaurant
Must include at least 1 special promotion

evaluationCriteria.description: The email must include at least 2 reasons why the customer should dine at the restaurant
The email must include at least 1 special promotion
The email must include a call-to-action
The LLM output must be at most 150 words
